summary: Lead accepts M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 after simulation_engineer R2, systems_architect R2 ACCEPT, and independent qa_reviewer R2 ACCEPT. The branch implements the bounded M5 simulation evidence slice through authoritative sim-core and GameCommandV1, explicit protocol/save schemas, deterministic Node and worker-host evidence, save/load round-trip, and duplicate-postwar rejection without adding UI/client/desktop, formal M5 passage, manual node battle, telemetry, server/multiplayer, full diplomacy, complex naval warfare, or arbitrary-code mod scope.

tests_run.result: VALID task file before lead acceptance update.

QA recorded 23 changed paths, all inside task-allowed sim-runner, sim-core, protocol, save-format, tests, and project state/message paths. No forbidden UI/client/desktop/content/tools/docs/gates/roadmap/release artifact paths changed.
QA recorded 23 test files passed; 172 tests passed.
QA recorded 1 test file passed; 9 tests passed.
QA recorded 2 test files passed; 16 tests passed.
QA recorded M5 Node hash bf042e42, worker-compatible hash bf042e42, loaded hash bf042e42, and one postwar arrangement.
QA recorded architecture boundaries, determinism, root vitest 34 files/244 tests, and apps/web vitest 1 file/4 tests passed.
QA recorded all workspace packages with typecheck scripts passed.
No whitespace errors reported before lead acceptance.

decisions: Accept the R2 implementation for PR/CI/main integration. Do not mark CLOSED until the accepted branch enters main and local main is synchronized.

Treat Node worker_threads JSON request/response as sufficient worker-host evidence for this task because browser/UI paths are forbidden here; browser Worker or client UI integration belongs to a downstream allowed client task.
Accept explicit nested M4 save DTO/parser/copy paths as the correct save-format boundary for this M5 loop; hidden nested keys must not hydrate into runtime state.

Preserve all M5 Human Gates: formal M5 passage, manual node battle, frozen product/platform/core architecture changes, telemetry/server/multiplayer/mods, release/commercial/branding, irreversible migrations, and major cultural-risk decisions.
Do not route back to simulation_engineer. systems_architect and qa_reviewer both ACCEPT R2.
risks: P3: worker-host proof is Node worker_threads rather than browser Worker. This is acceptable inside apps/sim-runner scope and should be covered by a future client task if browser Worker integration is needed.
P3: @monsoon/protocol has no package-level typecheck script; protocol tests passed and root pnpm typecheck passed for packages that define typecheck.
requested_action: Commit lead acceptance, push branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge into main, then close M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 and continue to the next dependency-ready M5 task.
